meaning: n.家庭生活,专心于家务,对家庭的挚爱,家庭生活
examples: Rather, it conjures up a quiet and dutiful domesticity.
If you strip away the veneer of happy domesticity, you may find grief.
The suburbs of Mumbai do not resemble the West's green acres of semi-detached domesticity.
As much as this bizarre tradition smacks of 1950s style domesticity, it dates back to just 1992.
Badham and Kouf try to lampoon retro notions of female domesticity and male know-how, but end up exploiting them.
